questions.question: From 10-14 February 2025, in which city did India host the annual Conference of the International Institute of Administrative Sciences (IIAS) for the first time?
In December 2024, which day honoured Dr BR Ambedkar’s contribution to social justice?
In February 2025, which day was celebrated to honour the Nightingale of India, Sarojini Naidu?
The Ministry of MSMEs in India celebrates the MSME Day on ______.
In January 2025, the Indian Army Day was celebrated to mark which significant event?
questions.option_3: First Indian Commander-in-Chief of the Army

questions.question: In March 2025, Ordnance Factories Day was observed to commemorate the founding of India’s first ordnance factory in _______.
In which of the following Australian cities did the Indian External Affairs Minister inaugurate India's 4th consulate in November 2024?
What is the primary objective of the Chandra's Surface Thermophysical Experiment (ChaSTE), 2025, payload?
questions.option_1: To measure the Moon's atmospheric pressure
questions.option_2: To study the Moon's magnetic field
questions.option_3: To assess the Moon's geological composition
questions.option_4: To measure the vertical temperature profile of the lunar regolith

questions.question: Sharda Sinha, honoured with the Padma Vibhushan in 2025, was originally known for singing in which Indian languages?

In March 2025, which anniversary of National Defence Day was observed to honour the sacrifices of India’s armed forces?
Where did the two-day Chintan Shivir, held on 7-8 March 2025 to discuss preparations for the 2028 and 2036 Olympics, take place?
In which city of India was the Arctic Circle India Forum held on 3-4 May 2025?
In January 2025, National Tourism Day was celebrated with which of the following themes?
In March 2025, which health milestone was remembered on National Vaccination Day?
In December 2024, which nationwide movement was launched to promote cycling as a sustainable and inclusive fitness activity?
Which Indian naval ship visited Port Louis, Mauritius, in March 2025 to participate in the 57ᵗʰ National Day celebrations?
In October 2024, Nayab Singh Saini sworn in for his second term as the Chief Minister of which Indian state?
As of February 2025, how many youth were trained in vocational skills under the Nehru Yuva Kendra Sangathan initiatives?
In January 2025, which of the following individuals was appointed as the Chairman of the Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO)?
Where was the 2024 International Conference of NGOs organised by UNESCO held?
In March 2025, NITI Aayog released the 'Future Front: Quarterly Frontier Tech Insights' report. What is the primary focus of this report?​
questions.option_1: Evaluating advancements and investments in quantum computing technologies
questions.option_2: Analysing the impact of climate change on coastal regions
questions.option_4: Reviewing the performance of state-run healthcare programs​

questions.question: For which discovery was Paul Ehrlich awarded the Nobel Prize in Medicine in 1908?
In November 2024, which Indian state conducted an Olympic-style school sports event with participation from Gulf-based Indian schools?
